login.title: Clean your inbox. Restore your peace.
login.subtitle: Easily find and unsubscribe from newsletters, promos, and spam with one click.
login.privacy: We only request read-only access to find unsubscribe links. We never delete or send emails.

dashboard.scan_tip1: Most newsletters have an unsubscribe link at the bottom
dashboard.scan_tip2: Gmail hides promotions in a separate tab — we scan there too
dashboard.scan_tip3: You can cut all subscriptions at once with the big button
dashboard.scan_tip4: Try Zen Mode for a keyboard-powered cleanup session
dashboard.scan_taking_long: This is taking longer than usual... hang tight!
dashboard.cleanup_confirm: Archive all existing emails from these senders? This removes them from your inbox.
dashboard.no_link_desc: We couldn't find a direct link. Consider blocking this sender in Gmail or marking as spam.

celebration.title: Inbox Zero! 🎉
celebration.desc: You've successfully cleared your pending subscriptions.
